scripts.clean: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); ['dist', 'temp'].forEach(path => fs.rmSync(path, { recursive: true, force: true }))"
scripts.build:framework: sass src/main.scss dist/framework.css --no-source-map && postcss dist/framework.css -o dist/framework.min.css
scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm run build:framework && pnpm run build:pages
